JESSICA DANZEY AND KELECHI AJAYI'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO DISMISS ONLY PLAINTIFF KELECHI AJAYI PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 3.770 IS GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, KELECHI AJAYI ONLY MAY BE DISMISSED AS A PLAINTIFF AS AN INDIVIDUAL AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED. PLAINTIFFS MUST FILE WITH THE CLERK A NOTICE OF DISMISSAL ON THE JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM AND PRESENT THIS ORDER WHEN DOING SO. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND DROP A HARD PAPER COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX FOR THE COURT'S REVIEW AND SIGNATURE. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2025 Continued To Aug-27-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Only Plaintiff Kelechi Ajayi Pursuant To California Rule Of Court 3.770; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Majed Dakak
Off Calendar Apr-04-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs JESSICA DANZEY. and KELECHI AJAYI's Motion To Dismiss Only Plaintiff Kelechi Ajayi Pursuant To California Rule Of Court 3.770.

Plaintiffs. Jessica Danzey and Kelechi Ajayi's unopposed Motion To Dismiss Only Plaintiff Kelechi Ajayi Pursuant To California Rule Of Court 3.770 is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, Kelechi Ajayi only may be dismissed as a plaintiff as an individual and on behalf of all others similarly situated. Plaintiffs must file with the clerk a notice of dismissal on the Judicial Council form and present this order when doing so.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and drop a hard paper copy in Dept. 302's inbox for the court's review and signature.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
